9: This chapter explored the vital Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) pattern, emphasizing its
10: role in creating robust, safe, and ethical AI systems. We discussed how integrating
11: human oversight, intervention, and feedback into agent workflows can significantly
12: enhance their performance and trustworthiness, especially in complex and sensitive
13: domains. The practical applications demonstrated HITL's widespread utility, from
14: content moderation and medical diagnosis to autonomous driving and customer
15: support. The conceptual code example provided a glimpse into how ADK can facilitate
16: these human-agent interactions through escalation mechanisms. As AI capabilities
17: continue to advance, HITL remains a cornerstone for responsible AI development,
18: ensuring that human values and expertise remain central to intelligent system design.
